revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a game-development 16-bit SNES-style pixel-art animated sprite sheet.

Canvas/sheet contract:
- Exact sheet size: 128x32 px.
- Grid: 1 row x 4 columns.
- Frame size: each frame is exactly 32x32 px.
- Total frames: 4.
- Background: solid flat #FF00FF magenta chroma key in all empty space, no gradients, no texture.
- No visible grid lines, no cell separator lines, no borders, no frame numbers, no labels, no text, no watermark.
- Every frame must stay fully inside its own 32x32 cell with clear solid magenta margin around the figure and every cell edge.
- Center the character in each cell; feet on the same ground line in all frames.
- No detached fragments, isolated pixel islands, seam slivers, dust specks, or leftover effect residue anywhere on the sheet.

Reference lock:
- Use the attached reference image as the approved proportion and pixel-density reference.
- Match the reference character's sturdy roughly 3-head-tall chibi body proportions, head-to-body ratio, solid body width, limb thickness, outline weight, pixel density, and overall scale exactly.
- This is re-posing the referenced body proportions, not designing a new body. The new character must not be thinner, lankier, longer-legged, or more big-headed than the reference.
- Same character identity and exact same scale in every frame. Head size, body width, limb thickness, standing body height, and pose footprint must match across all 4 frames.

Character:
- Original bright mythical-Japan action RPG village NPC: sturdy middle-aged village farmer man, kind common villager.
- Front view facing the viewer.
- Short dark hair under a folded indigo tenugui headband.
- Sun-tanned good-natured face with light stubble.
- Short brown-and-ochre work happi over a cream undershirt.
- Sash belt.
- Knee-length work trousers.
- Straw sandals.
- Not a samurai, not a soldier, not a ninja.
- No samurai armor, no kabuto helmet, no ninja outfit, no two-sword daisho, no gun, no modern objects.

Animation / frame contents, left to right:
1. Neutral idle standing, feet natural shoulder-width apart.
2. Slow breath: same footprint and scale, subtle chest/shoulder rise, tiny hand/cloth shift.
3. Warm blink and small smile: same scale and footprint, eyes closed/blinking with a friendly small smile.
4. Return to neutral pose for loop continuity, matching frame 1 closely.

Pixel-art rendering:
- Crisp low-resolution pixel art, hard pixel edges, no antialiasing blur.
- Bright cheerful palette, top-left light source.
- Consistent palette across frames.
- Dark one-pixel outline where useful.
- Fine readable pixel clusters appropriate for high-quality 16-bit-style game asset work.

Avoid any likeness, logos, or franchise-specific design elements from Mario/Nintendo/Zelda/Final Fantasy/Pokemon/Dragon Quest/Secret of Mana/Okami/Sakuna. No horror mood, no dark gloomy palette, no bird or companion creature, no letter emblems, no UI.
